prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低位次分别为13255→14760→13798→15428→14588，整体呈波动后移趋势，近5年位次中位数约14500名；2025年基准位次约14588名，较 2024年（15428）有所回升；该校在北京市招生计划2021年29人，2022–2025年均为28人；2026年计划26人，较2025年减少2人，小幅缩招约7.1%，理 论上使竞争略有缓和。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第56名，近年排名稳定在54–61区间，属于中上游211；近年声 誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音学校热度排名中未进入前100，短视频曝光一般，报考关注度处于中等水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校以地质学、地球物理学、资源勘查等地球科学类专业为主，相关专业大类社会热度平稳，非当前高热专业方向；北京市考生总数从2025年65434人增至2026 年84900人，增幅约29.7%，考生规模大幅扩大将显著加剧录取竞争；该校位于湖北武汉，在北京招生占比极小（历年约28 –29人），属跨省招生；北京考生对京外211高校的地域偏好一般，无明显地域加成。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14588、2026年缩招2人以及北京市考生数大幅增加约29 .7%三个关键因素：考生规模激增是推动位次上移（数字增大）的最强驱动力，其效应超过缩招带来的缓和作用。预测2026年最低位次约14163名，区间13663–14663名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14163名，区间13663–14663名。建议位次在区间下限（13663名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档的自动化类、计算机类等热门专业；位次在区间中段（约14163名）的考 生以二档专业为主、一档部分专业为辅；位次在区间上限（14663名）附近的考生以三档专业保底、二档专业冲刺。该校以地球科学为特色，相关专业学科实力较强但社会热度一 般，适合对地学有兴趣的考生重点考虑。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Beijing comprehensive subjects were 13255 → 14760 → 13798 → 15428 → 14588, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a median ranking of about 14500 in the past 5 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 14588, which has rebounded compared to 2024 (15428); the university's enrollment plan in Beijing was 29 in 2021, and 28 from 2022 to 2025; the plan for 2026 is 26, a decrease of 2 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 7.1%, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked about 56th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 54–61 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; it did not enter the top 100 in Douyin school popularity rankings, with average short video exposure and moderate application attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university mainly focuses on earth science majors such as geology, geophysics, and resource exploration, with related major categories having stable social popularity, not currently hot major directions; the total number of Beijing examinees increased from 65,434 in 2025 to 84,900 in 2026, an increase of about 29.7%, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying admission competition; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, with a very small proportion of enrollment in Beijing (about 28–29 people per year), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment; Beijing candidates generally have average regional preference for 211 universities outside Beijing, with no obvious regional advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the three key factors of the 2025 baseline ranking of 14588, a reduction of 2 students in 2026, and a significant increase of about 29.7% in the number of Beijing examinees: the surge in candidate numbers is the strongest driving force pushing the ranking upward (numerical increase), outweighing the easing effect of the enrollment reduction. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 14163, with a range of 13663–14663.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 14163, range 13663–14663. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (13663) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Automation and Computer Science; candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (about 14163) should mainly target Tier 2 majors, supplemented by some Tier 1 majors; candidates near the upper limit of the range (14663) should use Tier 3 majors as safety options and Tier 2 majors for sprinting. The university is characterized by earth sciences, with strong academic strength in related majors but average social popularity, suitable for candidates interested in geosciences.
